title: sloanea steyermarkii subsp. autanae
intro: Sloanea steyermarkii subsp. autanae is a plant species within the family Erythroxylaceae, commonly found in the rainforests of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Sloanea steyermarkii subsp. autanae include its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent, protect against infections, and support the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
